overall.description: A cinematic third-person video game sequence showing a character in a yellow vest ascending ancient stone stairs carved into a mountainside during golden hour. The character climbs through rocky terrain with autumn vegetation, passes other travelers, and approaches a large gothic stone archway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone stairway through rocky mountain corridor

events.description: path opens from enclosed rock corridor to reveal distant mountain vista with waterfall
passing a pedestrian walking down the stairs in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: climbing stone stairs steadily upward through the rocky mountain pass, glancing at blue crystals on the left wall

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing descending the stairs, passing the ego character around the 10 second mark

entered.detail: weathered stone steps carved into the mountainside, covered with patches of moss
tall vertical rock face forming the left boundary of the path
large boulders and rock formations on the right side
glowing blue crystalline formations embedded in the rock wall
hazy mountain peaks visible as the path opens up
red and orange leafy shrubs lining the right side of the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow rocky corridor with the character climbing ancient stone stairs. Glowing blue crystals are visible on the left rock face. Around 4 seconds, the view opens to reveal distant mountains and a waterfall. The character passes another traveler walking down the stairs at 10 seconds, while autumn-colored bushes line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountainside path with carved stone steps

events.description: stone owl statues on pillars become prominent along the right side of the path
ancient stone archway entrance comes into view at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: continuing to climb the open mountainside stairs with expansive views of the valley and distant waterfall

entered.detail: tall stone pillars topped with carved owl or bird figures, linked by chains
waterfall cascading down the distant mountain face
evergreen trees visible on the left horizon
large gothic stone archway entrance to a building, visible at the path's end

segments.scene_description: The path opens to a wide mountainside with full sky visibility. The character continues ascending stone stairs lined with stone owl statues on the right. Distant mountains and a waterfall dominate the background. Around 22 seconds, a large stone archway entrance becomes visible at the top of the climb.

scene_state.functional_zone: approach to ancient stone temple entrance

events.description: character enters the shadow of the stone archway, lighting shifts to mixed
character slows and stops at the large wooden door

agents.ego_description: approaching the ancient archway and walking into the shadowed entrance toward the wooden door

entered.detail: metal chains linking the stone pillars along the right side
ornate iron lanterns mounted on the archway walls
large dark wooden door with metal studs at the end of the archway
stone walls covered in green ivy vines

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching the massive stone archway entrance. The stone owl statues and mountain vistas fall behind as the character enters the shadowed archway. Ivy-covered walls and ornate lanterns frame the approach to a large wooden door, where the character slows to a stop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined rocky corridor that gradually opens into a vast mountain vista before culminating at a massive gothic entrance. It begins with the character ascending ancient stone stairs flanked by glowing blue crystals, moving forward as the narrow walls give way to a panoramic view of distant mountains and a waterfall. As the character passes a descending traveler amidst autumn-colored bushes, the path expands into a wide mountainside where the stairs are lined with stone owl statues. The scene then shifts focus toward the summit as a large stone archway emerges against the open sky, drawing the character upward and away from the mountain vistas. Finally, the camera follows the character into the shadowed archway, passing ivy-covered walls and ornate lanterns before coming to a stop at a large wooden door.
